framework_packs.label: Core SaaS
framework_packs.description: Balanced baseline for enterprise SaaS products handling security, privacy, and resilience concerns.
framework_packs.guidance: Prioritise standard SaaS trust controls, privacy obligations, tenant isolation, auditability, and operational resilience.

framework_packs.label: AI Product
framework_packs.description: Adds AI governance and assurance expectations for systems that use models in material ways.
framework_packs.guidance: Prioritise AI governance, human oversight, model transparency, provider due diligence, monitoring, and evidence of responsible AI operations.

framework_packs.label: Ecommerce
framework_packs.description: Focuses on privacy, payment, and high-availability obligations common in customer-facing commerce flows.
framework_packs.guidance: Prioritise payment security, customer data protection, fraud-aware controls, peak resiliency, and incident traceability.

framework_packs.label: Fintech
framework_packs.description: Emphasises resilience, auditability, security, and governance expectations for regulated financial platforms.
framework_packs.guidance: Prioritise strong operational resilience, audit trails, third-party oversight, recovery planning, and regulated change control.

framework_packs.label: Health
framework_packs.description: Biases toward sensitive personal data, safety, traceability, and healthcare governance expectations.
framework_packs.guidance: Prioritise patient or health-data protection, access control, auditability, retention, and evidence that sensitive data is handled appropriately.

framework_packs.label: Public Sector
framework_packs.description: Highlights security, accessibility, resilience, and procurement-grade assurance expectations.
framework_packs.guidance: Prioritise accessibility, public-service resilience, evidence-heavy governance, supplier assurance, and defensible audit trails.

industry_profiles.label: SaaS
industry_profiles.description: General enterprise SaaS profile with emphasis on tenant isolation, trust, reliability, and supportability.
industry_profiles.guidance: Bias toward multi-tenant security, service reliability, supportability, and operational governance common to enterprise SaaS.

industry_profiles.label: AI SaaS
industry_profiles.description: Enterprise SaaS profile with additional emphasis on AI governance, transparency, oversight, and provider risk.
industry_profiles.guidance: Bias toward responsible AI controls, human oversight, output traceability, monitoring, and third-party model governance.

industry_profiles.label: Ecommerce
industry_profiles.description: Customer-facing commerce systems with stronger emphasis on peak scale, payments, resilience, and customer data handling.
industry_profiles.guidance: Bias toward peak traffic handling, secure transactions, customer-data protection, and commercial uptime expectations.

industry_profiles.label: Fintech
industry_profiles.description: Regulated financial platforms with emphasis on resilience, auditability, change control, and third-party governance.
industry_profiles.guidance: Bias toward regulated operations, traceable changes, strong recovery expectations, and defensible third-party oversight.

industry_profiles.label: Healthtech
industry_profiles.description: Health-related systems with emphasis on sensitive data handling, traceability, access control, and safety-aware operations.
industry_profiles.guidance: Bias toward sensitive health-data protection, traceability, strong access control, and evidence for privacy and operational safety.

industry_profiles.label: Public Sector
industry_profiles.description: Public-service systems with emphasis on accessibility, resilience, supplier assurance, and strong governance evidence.
industry_profiles.guidance: Bias toward accessibility, public accountability, evidence-heavy governance, and resilience for citizen-facing services.
